login.subtitle: Log in to manage your farm

signup.title: Create Profile
signup.subtitle: Verify your identity with Aadhaar & Mobile

dashboard.scanDesc: Scan QR codes on seeds, fertilizers, and pesticides to check authenticity instantly.
dashboard.cropDesc: Upload photos of your crop leaves to detect diseases and get instant remedies.
dashboard.soilDesc: View historical yield data, soil metrics, and personalized fertilizer recommendations.
dashboard.reportDesc: Submit evidence of fake products directly to the agricultural inspection authorities.
dashboard.promoText: Scanning all inputs before use guarantees subsidy eligibility and protects your soil from heavy metal contamination found in fake fertilizers.
dashboard.completeProfile: Complete your profile to unlock region features

chatbot.initialGreeting: Hello! I am KrishiBot, your cosmic farming assistant. 🌾 I can help you with crop advice, pest management, and soil health. How can I assist your farm today?
chatbot.error: Error: Transmission failed. The void is deep. Please try again later.
chatbot.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support cosmic voice transmission.
